title: stachys setifera subsp. iranica
intro: Stachys setifera subsp. iranica, also known as Iranian hedge nettle, is a plant species within the genus Stachys, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems. The plant's leaves and flowers possess health benefits, such as antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of colds, sore throats, and bronchitis. Stachys setifera subsp. iranica is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusions to harness its medicinal properties, and in some cases, it may be used in combination with other herbs for enhanced therapeutic effects.
